member.name: T:DAL.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:DAL.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:DAL.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.returns: True: if validation passed and vice versa.

member.returns: True: if Record is successfully added and vice versa

member.returns: Data Table containing all Records

member.returns: True: if Deletion is successfully processed and vice versa

member.remarks: iShareType =1 (Regular Sales) iShareType =3 (Discount Sales (Products))

member.name: M:DAL.SharedFolder.ShareExistingFolder(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{DAL.SharePermissionEntry},System.String)
member.summary: Shares an existing folder on the local computer or on a remote computer
member.param: The name for the share
An optional comment/description for the share
The local path to the folder to be shared. If creating share on a remote computer then the path must be local to the remote computer. Do not use UNC paths
The share permissions to assign to this share
OPTIONAL - the remote computer name to create the share on

member.name: P:DAL.SharePermissionEntry.DomainName
member.summary: The domain name that the user/group in the UserOrGroupName property belongs to

member.name: P:DAL.SharePermissionEntry.UserOrGroupName
member.summary: The name of the user or group that should be granted/denied permission

member.name: P:DAL.SharePermissionEntry.Permission
member.summary: The share permission to grant or deny for the account in UserOrGroupName

member.name: P:DAL.SharePermissionEntry.AllowOrDeny
member.summary: Set to True to allow the rights specified in the Permission property and False to deny the rights specified in the Permission property. Default is True.

member.name: M:DAL.SharePermissionEntry.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the SharePermissionEntry class

member.name: M:DAL.SharePermissionEntry.#ctor(System.String,System.String,DAL.SharedFolder.SharePermissions,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the SharePermissionEntry class and populates each of the properties within the instance
member.param: The domain that the user in the AccountName argument belongs to. Pass String.Empty or Nothing here if you are specifying a 'well known' identity such as the Everyone group in the AccountName argument
The username or group name that this permission entry relates to
The share permission to grant/deny
True to allow the permission, False to deny the permission

member.name: M:DAL.SecurityUserDAL.FindValidUser(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: This function will get an object of SecurityUser class and will query to database for the valid user information against the ginven values of loginDI and LoginPassword. members.member:
Function will validate returning qty of a product item was sold in a specific invoice
Product Item Id for which return require to be validated Shop Id on which sales was made Invoice Id to be returned added against cr#6012 by Hafiz Ahsan Invoice Id to be Updated Will return qty that was soled in the invoice R@! Shahid CR 5697 =====================================

member.name: M:DAL.SaleAndReturnDAL.IsValidInvoiceForReturn(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Function will validate a specific invoice
member.param: Shop Id on which sales was made
Invoice Id to be returned
member.returns: Will return True for a valid invoice
member.remarks: R@! Shahid CR 5697

members.member:
CR # 6527 this is override function Add. previously we can't pass transaction to sales from outside of this Calss or out of the Assembly now we can Call Add Method with or Without Transaction and this will not hurt any existing code
issue#692 Optional ByVal myCreditNoteDataTable As DataTable = Nothing condition added Optional ByVal IsTouchPOS As Boolean = False added against Issue # 943

member.name: M:DAL.SaleAndReturnDAL.AddToAdvanceOrder(Model.SaleAndReturn,Utility.Utility.EnumActions,System.String)
member.summary: To save, update and delete advance order this function will be used
member.param: Sale and Return model will be passed with the values to be recorded in advance order
Action to be performed (eg Save, Update or Delete)
Database connection string (optional) where DML operation will be performed
member.returns: Will return true if execution will be successfull

members.member:
Sales Transfer Utility: Add criteria for transfered invoices
Query string to be executed Connection string to connect db True/False Implemented on 11-Aug-2011 11-Aug-2011 CR# 2632 R@! Sales Transfer Utility: Add criteria for transfered invoices

member.returns: Will return True when price change found

member.returns: Will datatable when price change found
